TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Slamaw_梨山部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki cqa Taycyu llyung Tmali qalang Slamaw, qutux seng spat kbhul meta nya, baha hmcwa pnuya naha piyux bway kya hrhul, pisan nasi, ringo, mica qa cnlalu naha Lishan ke Thelu. qalang qani ga skahul piyux ini ptnaq minrok na cquliq p'imax mqyanux, ana Tayal, ngayngay, Kahat, Thelu, ro qalang Slamaw qani ga msqun ki qalang Tabuk, qalang Kayu, qalang Sqoyaw msqun mqyanux, qabax qani ga ki'an skura kya htgan wagi cqa llyung Tmali, qabax qalang qani ga pisqunun naha san naha "ki'an Tyaba Slamaw" ginlasu ga lalu Slamaw calay ga san naha Raka, mehong lga pyugan naha lalu nya san naha Slamaw, ro puqing piqyuwan na lalu qalang naha ga ini baqi khangi mwani la. Raka Slamaw, . pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 qalang Kiyay ga maki cqa qalang Slamaw mwani, cyunga ga maki cqa iyil be'nux na llyung Tmali. qutux seng qesu kbhul mpusal magan kawas shyan naha ski bawiq qalang Kayo qa hasisyo Slamaw. maki kya kbalay xqayus na qalang. cqaca ga maki cqa mwani na psyan abura Slamaw lingay nya. qutux seng qesu kbhul miman pitu kawas ryaniq Conghen hiya ga hminas qalang bawiq naha, ro qutux seng qesu kbhul mtuyu pgan tyugan kawas khotaw ryaniq naha, ro lungun qalang naha ma ini baqi mqyanux qalang qani la, mica qa qutux seng qesu kbhul mtuyu pgan tyugan kawas lga cimang cimang shyan naha ski qalang Slamaw, cnbyan naha mqyanux cqa ryaniq Reshe, ryaniq Syanyun, ryaniq Qanghwa, ryaniq Minsheng. qalang Pyahaw tyugan kbhul mpusan mtuyu qabax cquliq naha, ro hbku ski mpux payat kawas na laqi mrkyas ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki akya mpux cquliq nya, ro mpux magan mpux magan kawas na klokah hayi na cquliq ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki miman mspat cquliq nya, ro miman magan kawas na yutas yaki, qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mtuyul saying cquliq nya. ro tayux kahul cqenu minrok naha hiya ga, cquliq Tayal qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mqesu pgan cquliq nya, ro binah lga cquliq binah minrok la. qalang Slamaw hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Slamaw hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya, pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kbalay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. skahul Karinko (basu Karinko)→linhoyan klhangan kokak cqa Truku→Tayulin→ qalang Slamaw 花蓮 →太魯閣國家公園→大禹領→梨山. skahul Girang ini ga Lutung (basu Kokwang)→qalang Mtalah uraw→qalang Pyanan→ qmayah Ulin→qalang Slamaw 宜蘭,羅東 →大同→南山→武陵農場→梨山. ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 qalang Slamaw hiya ga baha hmcwa khmay ciyan cquliq naha la, mica qa knalay naha ki'an pklahang bnheci naha, ro qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki mblaq na psbaqan ro byoing phgup. pincrux uyi pqwasan biru ro byoing, musa mkrax kinmxan cquliq ro psbaq llaqi. qalang Slamaw qani ga qalang Tayal, kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga nyan kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, us ga cipak hayi kblay yaw na cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. . cipak kinbaqan na gaga Rangaw Basaw耆老內容: raral ga maki sami qalang sraral ga "qalang sraral ga"qalang raral ga"em"qalang raral naki sa kya ru ryax nasa ga Kokumin gako sami ga gako Kokumin"baqun mu ryax nasa ga cimang sami na, ryax gako Kokumin nasa ga ici nengse sami ga"em ici nengse"aw ici nengse sami ga shyan ski sqani la. "han"rima knal mha gamaki sqani ma"swa mwah cani la"baha hmswa ga, qmayah"han"qmayah theyaq ru theyaq, mhkangi ru mhkangi sqa,"qmayah maki sqani"maki t hani kwara qmayah ga "han"qalang yaga maki squ qalang Kyahu"han…"qmayah ga maki bawiq mha hani"ro sraral ga maki nanu gaga Tayal"maki ay "kayal cikay ana nanu"maki gaga ay"pquyu cikay ga maki nanu gaga"gaga raral ga ini hmut mqyanux ga"ro likuy ga maki nanu gaga""imi mu ga pisa musa…"likuy ga musa qmalup"em" musa qmalup ska rgyax ga. "musa rgyax ga"aw, kneril ga aro kneril ga mqumah"mqumah" mqumah,"baqun su sraral ga maki tminun"maki ay"wal su talan uyi""tminun sa"yaya mu sraral tminun uyi"han"tminun yaya mu raral"em ro sta knwan lga uka tninun ca la"rema mhoqil la mhoqil yaya mu ga ungat la, ini cinun la"ro sraral ga wal su talan ptasan na squliq"maki ay"maki uyi ga"yaki mu ga"yaki su " yaya yaba mu ga ptasan mha qa"aw yaya yaba su ga"aw yaya yaba mu ru yaba yaba mu ga ptasan qa baq qa"ini kxal qasa"aw a"ini kmxal qa…" baqaw ta ini kxal hiya ga sraral rwa'an nha nanaq ma ziray Ipun"rom ga"han rom ga, mwani lga spatas naha lma ga? "em""mwani lga aki uka gaga hani la" ungat ungat la ungat gaga mwani la. .
S.PHON: == mwani mis~ɕuw qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨjux te inu ******* == qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa tajʦ~ʨju lljuŋ tmali qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕpat kβħul meta nja, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa pnuja naħa pijux βwaj kja ħrħul, pis~ɕan nas~ɕi, riŋo, miʦ~ʨa qa ʦ~ʨnlalu naħa lis~ɕħan ke tħelu. qalaŋ qani ɣa s~ɕkaħul pijux ini ptnaq minrok na ʦ~ʨquliq pʔimax mqjanux, ana tajal, ŋajŋaj, kaħat, tħelu, ro qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw qani ɣa ms~ɕqun ki qalaŋ taβuk, qalaŋ kaju, qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ms~ɕqun mqjanux, qaβax qani ɣa kiʔan s~ɕkura kja ħtɣan waɣi ʦ~ʨqa lljuŋ tmali, qaβax qalaŋ qani ɣa pis~ɕqunun naħa s~ɕan naħa "kiʔan tjaβa s~ɕlamaw" ɣinlas~ɕu ɣa lalu s~ɕlamaw ʦ~ʨalaj ɣa s~ɕan naħa raka, meħoŋ lɣa pjuɣan naħa lalu nja s~ɕan naħa s~ɕlamaw, ro puqiŋ piqjuwan na lalu qalaŋ naħa ɣa ini βaqi kħaŋi mwani la. raka s~ɕlamaw, . pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** qalaŋ kijaj ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw mwani, ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa ijil βeʔnux na lljuŋ tmali. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal maɣan kawas~ɕ s~ɕħjan naħa s~ɕki βawiq qalaŋ kajo qa ħas~ɕis~ɕjo s~ɕlamaw. maki kja kβalaj xqajus~ɕ na qalaŋ. ʦ~ʨqaʦ~ʨa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa mwani na ps~ɕjan aβura s~ɕlamaw liŋaj nja. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul miman pitu kawas~ɕ rjaniq ʦ~ʨoŋħen ħija ɣa ħminas~ɕ qalaŋ βawiq naħa, ro qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul mtuju pɣan tjuɣan kawas~ɕ kħotaw rjaniq naħa, ro luŋun qalaŋ naħa ma ini βaqi mqjanux qalaŋ qani la, miʦ~ʨa qa qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul mtuju pɣan tjuɣan kawas~ɕ lɣa ʦ~ʨimaŋ ʦ~ʨimaŋ s~ɕħjan naħa s~ɕki qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, ʦ~ʨnβjan naħa mqjanux ʦ~ʨqa rjaniq res~ɕħe, rjaniq s~ɕjanjun, rjaniq qaŋħwa, rjaniq mins~ɕħeŋ. qalaŋ pjaħaw tjuɣan kβħul mpus~ɕan mtuju qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq naħa, ro ħβku s~ɕki mpux pajat kawas~ɕ na laqi mrkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki akja mpux ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro mpux maɣan mpux maɣan kawas~ɕ na klokaħ ħaji na ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki miman ms~ɕpat ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro miman maɣan kawas~ɕ na jutas~ɕ jaki, qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mtujul s~ɕajiŋ ʦ~ʨquliq nja. ro tajux kaħul ʦ~ʨqenu minrok naħa ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq tajal qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mqes~ɕu pɣan ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro βinaħ lɣa ʦ~ʨquliq βinaħ minrok la. qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja, paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβalaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. s~ɕkaħul karinko (βas~ɕu karinko)*linħojan klħaŋan kokak ʦ~ʨqa truku*tajulin* qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ** ***************. s~ɕkaħul ɣiraŋ ini ɣa lutuŋ (βas~ɕu kokwaŋ)*qalaŋ mtalaħ uraw*qalaŋ pjanan* qmajaħ ulin*qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw **,** **************. kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa kħmaj ʦ~ʨijan ʦ~ʨquliq naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa knalaj naħa kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa, ro qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki mβlaq na ps~ɕβaqan ro βjoiŋ pħɣup. pinʦ~ʨrux uji pqwas~ɕan βiru ro βjoiŋ, mus~ɕa mkrax kinmxan ʦ~ʨquliq ro ps~ɕβaq llaqi. qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw qani ɣa qalaŋ tajal, kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa njan kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, us~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨipak ħaji kβlaj jaw na ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. . ʦ~ʨipak kinβaqan na ɣaɣa raŋaw βas~ɕaw****: raral ɣa maki s~ɕami qalaŋ s~ɕraral ɣa "qalaŋ s~ɕraral ɣa"qalaŋ raral ɣa"em"qalaŋ raral naki s~ɕa kja ru rjax nas~ɕa ɣa kokumin ɣako s~ɕami ɣa ɣako kokumin"βaqun mu rjax nas~ɕa ɣa ʦ~ʨimaŋ s~ɕami na, rjax ɣako kokumin nas~ɕa ɣa iʦ~ʨi neŋs~ɕe s~ɕami ɣa"em iʦ~ʨi neŋs~ɕe"aw iʦ~ʨi neŋs~ɕe s~ɕami ɣa s~ɕħjan s~ɕki s~ɕqani la. "ħan"rima knal mħa ɣamaki s~ɕqani ma"s~ɕwa mwaħ ʦ~ʨani la"βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa, qmajaħ"ħan"qmajaħ tħejaq ru tħejaq, mħkaŋi ru mħkaŋi s~ɕqa,"qmajaħ maki s~ɕqani"maki t ħani kwara qmajaħ ɣa "ħan"qalaŋ jaɣa maki s~ɕqu qalaŋ kjaħu"ħan*"qmajaħ ɣa maki βawiq mħa ħani"ro s~ɕraral ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa tajal"maki aj "kajal ʦ~ʨikaj ana nanu"maki ɣaɣa aj"pquju ʦ~ʨikaj ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa"ɣaɣa raral ɣa ini ħmut mqjanux ɣa"ro likuj ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa""imi mu ɣa pis~ɕa mus~ɕa*"likuj ɣa mus~ɕa qmalup"em" mus~ɕa qmalup s~ɕka rɣjax ɣa. "mus~ɕa rɣjax ɣa"aw, kneril ɣa aro kneril ɣa mqumaħ"mqumaħ" mqumaħ,"βaqun s~ɕu s~ɕraral ɣa maki tminun"maki aj"wal s~ɕu talan uji""tminun s~ɕa"jaja mu s~ɕraral tminun uji"ħan"tminun jaja mu raral"em ro s~ɕta knwan lɣa uka tninun ʦ~ʨa la"rema mħoqil la mħoqil jaja mu ɣa uŋat la, ini ʦ~ʨinun la"ro s~ɕraral ɣa wal s~ɕu talan ptas~ɕan na s~ɕquliq"maki aj"maki uji ɣa"jaki mu ɣa"jaki s~ɕu " jaja jaβa mu ɣa ptas~ɕan mħa qa"aw jaja jaβa s~ɕu ɣa"aw jaja jaβa mu ru jaβa jaβa mu ɣa ptas~ɕan qa βaq qa"ini kxal qas~ɕa"aw a"ini kmxal qa*" βaqaw ta ini kxal ħija ɣa s~ɕraral rwaʔan nħa nanaq ma ziraj ipun"rom ɣa"ħan rom ɣa, mwani lɣa s~ɕpatas~ɕ naħa lma ɣa? "em""mwani lɣa aki uka ɣaɣa ħani la" uŋat uŋat la uŋat ɣaɣa mwani la. .
S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki cqa Taycyu llyung Tmali qalang Slamaw, qutux seng spat kbhul meta nya, baha hmcwa pnuya naha piyux bway kya hrhul, pisan nasi, ringo, mica qa cnlalu naha Lishan ke Thelu. qalang qani ga skahul piyux ini ptnaq minrok na cquliq p'imax mqyanux, ana Tayal, ngayngay, Kahat, Thelu, ro qalang Slamaw qani ga msqun ki qalang Tabuk, qalang Kayu, qalang Sqoyaw msqun mqyanux, qabax qani ga ki'an skura kya htgan wagi cqa llyung Tmali, qabax qalang qani ga pisqunun naha san naha "ki'an Tyaba Slamaw" ginlasu ga lalu Slamaw calay ga san naha Raka, mehong lga pyugan naha lalu nya san naha Slamaw, ro puqing piqyuwan na lalu qalang naha ga ini baqi khangi mwani la. Raka Slamaw, . pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 qalang Kiyay ga maki cqa qalang Slamaw mwani, cyunga ga maki cqa iyil be'nux na llyung Tmali. qutux seng qesu kbhul mpusal magan kawas shyan naha ski bawiq qalang Kayo qa hasisyo Slamaw. maki kya kbalay xqayus na qalang. cqaca ga maki cqa mwani na psyan abura Slamaw lingay nya. qutux seng qesu kbhul miman pitu kawas ryaniq Conghen hiya ga hminas qalang bawiq naha, ro qutux seng qesu kbhul mtuyu pgan tyugan kawas khotaw ryaniq naha, ro lungun qalang naha ma ini baqi mqyanux qalang qani la, mica qa qutux seng qesu kbhul mtuyu pgan tyugan kawas lga cimang cimang shyan naha ski qalang Slamaw, cnbyan naha mqyanux cqa ryaniq Reshe, ryaniq Syanyun, ryaniq Qanghwa, ryaniq Minsheng. qalang Pyahaw tyugan kbhul mpusan mtuyu qabax cquliq naha, ro hbku ski mpux payat kawas na laqi mrkyas ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki akya mpux cquliq nya, ro mpux magan mpux magan kawas na klokah hayi na cquliq ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki miman mspat cquliq nya, ro miman magan kawas na yutas yaki, qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mtuyul saying cquliq nya. ro tayux kahul cqenu minrok naha hiya ga, cquliq Tayal qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mqesu pgan cquliq nya, ro binah lga cquliq binah minrok la. qalang Slamaw hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Slamaw hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya, pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kbalay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. skahul Karinko (basu Karinko)→linhoyan klhangan kokak cqa Truku→Tayulin→ qalang Slamaw 花蓮 →太魯閣國家公園→大禹領→梨山. skahul Girang ini ga Lutung (basu Kokwang)→qalang Mtalah uraw→qalang Pyanan→ qmayah Ulin→qalang Slamaw 宜蘭,羅東 →大同→南山→武陵農場→梨山. ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 qalang Slamaw hiya ga baha hmcwa khmay ciyan cquliq naha la, mica qa knalay naha ki'an pklahang bnheci naha, ro qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki mblaq na psbaqan ro byoing phgup. pincrux uyi pqwasan biru ro byoing, musa mkrax kinmxan cquliq ro psbaq llaqi. qalang Slamaw qani ga qalang Tayal, kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga nyan kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, us ga cipak hayi kblay yaw na cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. . cipak kinbaqan na gaga Rangaw Basaw耆老內容: raral ga maki sami qalang sraral ga "qalang sraral ga"qalang raral ga"em"qalang raral naki sa kya ru ryax nasa ga Kokumin gako sami ga gako Kokumin"baqun mu ryax nasa ga cimang sami na, ryax gako Kokumin nasa ga ici nengse sami ga"em ici nengse"aw ici nengse sami ga shyan ski sqani la. "han"rima knal mha gamaki sqani ma"swa mwah cani la"baha hmswa ga, qmayah"han"qmayah theyaq ru theyaq, mhkangi ru mhkangi sqa,"qmayah maki sqani"maki t hani kwara qmayah ga "han"qalang yaga maki squ qalang Kyahu"han…"qmayah ga maki bawiq mha hani"ro sraral ga maki nanu gaga Tayal"maki ay "kayal cikay ana nanu"maki gaga ay"pquyu cikay ga maki nanu gaga"gaga raral ga ini hmut mqyanux ga"ro likuy ga maki nanu gaga""imi mu ga pisa musa…"likuy ga musa qmalup"em" musa qmalup ska rgyax ga. "musa rgyax ga"aw, kneril ga aro kneril ga mqumah"mqumah" mqumah,"baqun su sraral ga maki tminun"maki ay"wal su talan uyi""tminun sa"yaya mu sraral tminun uyi"han"tminun yaya mu raral"em ro sta knwan lga uka tninun ca la"rema mhoqil la mhoqil yaya mu ga ungat la, ini cinun la"ro sraral ga wal su talan ptasan na squliq"maki ay"maki uyi ga"yaki mu ga"yaki su " yaya yaba mu ga ptasan mha qa"aw yaya yaba su ga"aw yaya yaba mu ru yaba yaba mu ga ptasan qa baq qa"ini kxal qasa"aw a"ini kmxal qa…" baqaw ta ini kxal hiya ga sraral rwa'an nha nanaq ma ziray Ipun"rom ga"han rom ga, mwani lga spatas naha lma ga? "em""mwani lga aki uka gaga hani la" ungat ungat la ungat gaga mwani la. .
S.PHON: == mwani mis~ɕuw qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨjux te inu ******* == qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa tajʦ~ʨju lljuŋ tmali qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕpat kβħul meta nja, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa pnuja naħa pijux βwaj kja ħrħul, pis~ɕan nas~ɕi, riŋo, miʦ~ʨa qa ʦ~ʨnlalu naħa lis~ɕħan ke tħelu. qalaŋ qani ɣa s~ɕkaħul pijux ini ptnaq minrok na ʦ~ʨquliq pʔimax mqjanux, ana tajal, ŋajŋaj, kaħat, tħelu, ro qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw qani ɣa ms~ɕqun ki qalaŋ taβuk, qalaŋ kaju, qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ms~ɕqun mqjanux, qaβax qani ɣa kiʔan s~ɕkura kja ħtɣan waɣi ʦ~ʨqa lljuŋ tmali, qaβax qalaŋ qani ɣa pis~ɕqunun naħa s~ɕan naħa "kiʔan tjaβa s~ɕlamaw" ɣinlas~ɕu ɣa lalu s~ɕlamaw ʦ~ʨalaj ɣa s~ɕan naħa raka, meħoŋ lɣa pjuɣan naħa lalu nja s~ɕan naħa s~ɕlamaw, ro puqiŋ piqjuwan na lalu qalaŋ naħa ɣa ini βaqi kħaŋi mwani la. raka s~ɕlamaw, . pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** qalaŋ kijaj ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw mwani, ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa ijil βeʔnux na lljuŋ tmali. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal maɣan kawas~ɕ s~ɕħjan naħa s~ɕki βawiq qalaŋ kajo qa ħas~ɕis~ɕjo s~ɕlamaw. maki kja kβalaj xqajus~ɕ na qalaŋ. ʦ~ʨqaʦ~ʨa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa mwani na ps~ɕjan aβura s~ɕlamaw liŋaj nja. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul miman pitu kawas~ɕ rjaniq ʦ~ʨoŋħen ħija ɣa ħminas~ɕ qalaŋ βawiq naħa, ro qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul mtuju pɣan tjuɣan kawas~ɕ kħotaw rjaniq naħa, ro luŋun qalaŋ naħa ma ini βaqi mqjanux qalaŋ qani la, miʦ~ʨa qa qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕu kβħul mtuju pɣan tjuɣan kawas~ɕ lɣa ʦ~ʨimaŋ ʦ~ʨimaŋ s~ɕħjan naħa s~ɕki qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, ʦ~ʨnβjan naħa mqjanux ʦ~ʨqa rjaniq res~ɕħe, rjaniq s~ɕjanjun, rjaniq qaŋħwa, rjaniq mins~ɕħeŋ. qalaŋ pjaħaw tjuɣan kβħul mpus~ɕan mtuju qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq naħa, ro ħβku s~ɕki mpux pajat kawas~ɕ na laqi mrkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki akja mpux ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro mpux maɣan mpux maɣan kawas~ɕ na klokaħ ħaji na ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki miman ms~ɕpat ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro miman maɣan kawas~ɕ na jutas~ɕ jaki, qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mtujul s~ɕajiŋ ʦ~ʨquliq nja. ro tajux kaħul ʦ~ʨqenu minrok naħa ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq tajal qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mqes~ɕu pɣan ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro βinaħ lɣa ʦ~ʨquliq βinaħ minrok la. qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja, paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβalaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. s~ɕkaħul karinko (βas~ɕu karinko)*linħojan klħaŋan kokak ʦ~ʨqa truku*tajulin* qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ** ***************. s~ɕkaħul ɣiraŋ ini ɣa lutuŋ (βas~ɕu kokwaŋ)*qalaŋ mtalaħ uraw*qalaŋ pjanan* qmajaħ ulin*qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw **,** **************. kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa kħmaj ʦ~ʨijan ʦ~ʨquliq naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa knalaj naħa kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa, ro qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki mβlaq na ps~ɕβaqan ro βjoiŋ pħɣup. pinʦ~ʨrux uji pqwas~ɕan βiru ro βjoiŋ, mus~ɕa mkrax kinmxan ʦ~ʨquliq ro ps~ɕβaq llaqi. qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw qani ɣa qalaŋ tajal, kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa njan kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, us~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨipak ħaji kβlaj jaw na ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. . ʦ~ʨipak kinβaqan na ɣaɣa raŋaw βas~ɕaw****: raral ɣa maki s~ɕami qalaŋ s~ɕraral ɣa "qalaŋ s~ɕraral ɣa"qalaŋ raral ɣa"em"qalaŋ raral naki s~ɕa kja ru rjax nas~ɕa ɣa kokumin ɣako s~ɕami ɣa ɣako kokumin"βaqun mu rjax nas~ɕa ɣa ʦ~ʨimaŋ s~ɕami na, rjax ɣako kokumin nas~ɕa ɣa iʦ~ʨi neŋs~ɕe s~ɕami ɣa"em iʦ~ʨi neŋs~ɕe"aw iʦ~ʨi neŋs~ɕe s~ɕami ɣa s~ɕħjan s~ɕki s~ɕqani la. "ħan"rima knal mħa ɣamaki s~ɕqani ma"s~ɕwa mwaħ ʦ~ʨani la"βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa, qmajaħ"ħan"qmajaħ tħejaq ru tħejaq, mħkaŋi ru mħkaŋi s~ɕqa,"qmajaħ maki s~ɕqani"maki t ħani kwara qmajaħ ɣa "ħan"qalaŋ jaɣa maki s~ɕqu qalaŋ kjaħu"ħan*"qmajaħ ɣa maki βawiq mħa ħani"ro s~ɕraral ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa tajal"maki aj "kajal ʦ~ʨikaj ana nanu"maki ɣaɣa aj"pquju ʦ~ʨikaj ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa"ɣaɣa raral ɣa ini ħmut mqjanux ɣa"ro likuj ɣa maki nanu ɣaɣa""imi mu ɣa pis~ɕa mus~ɕa*"likuj ɣa mus~ɕa qmalup"em" mus~ɕa qmalup s~ɕka rɣjax ɣa. "mus~ɕa rɣjax ɣa"aw, kneril ɣa aro kneril ɣa mqumaħ"mqumaħ" mqumaħ,"βaqun s~ɕu s~ɕraral ɣa maki tminun"maki aj"wal s~ɕu talan uji""tminun s~ɕa"jaja mu s~ɕraral tminun uji"ħan"tminun jaja mu raral"em ro s~ɕta knwan lɣa uka tninun ʦ~ʨa la"rema mħoqil la mħoqil jaja mu ɣa uŋat la, ini ʦ~ʨinun la"ro s~ɕraral ɣa wal s~ɕu talan ptas~ɕan na s~ɕquliq"maki aj"maki uji ɣa"jaki mu ɣa"jaki s~ɕu " jaja jaβa mu ɣa ptas~ɕan mħa qa"aw jaja jaβa s~ɕu ɣa"aw jaja jaβa mu ru jaβa jaβa mu ɣa ptas~ɕan qa βaq qa"ini kxal qas~ɕa"aw a"ini kmxal qa*" βaqaw ta ini kxal ħija ɣa s~ɕraral rwaʔan nħa nanaq ma ziraj ipun"rom ɣa"ħan rom ɣa, mwani lɣa s~ɕpatas~ɕ naħa lma ɣa? "em""mwani lɣa aki uka ɣaɣa ħani la" uŋat uŋat la uŋat ɣaɣa mwani la. .
